nasb.text: These are the families of the sons of Ephraim according to those who were numbered of them, 32,500. These are the sons of Joseph according to their families.

esv.text: These are the clans of the sons of Ephraim as they were listed, 32,500. These are the sons of Joseph according to their clans.

cnv.text: 這些就是以法蓮子孫的各家族，按著他們各家族被數點的，共有三萬二千五百人。按著他們的家族，這些都是約瑟的子孫。

ccb.text: 这些是以法莲各宗族，共登记了三万二千五百人，都是约瑟的子孙。
